rationale: Tag Heuer continuity — see product-split-roadmap.md LOCKED DECISIONS for context. Erevna's app theme inherits BaseClient's current defaults verbatim. This brand config applies only to the marketing landing.

wordmark.notes: Linear / Vercel-style geometric. Modern indie SaaS standard. Pairs cleanly with the Greek portfolio (Morphe, EisaiPollis Games).

tagline.notes: Three-beat rhythm, classic transformation framing. Pairs with the Outfit wordmark by setting up a cognitive arc — the curiosity in the lowercase 'wondering' resolves into the certainty of 'knowing'.
